上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: SmallKV, a small model assisted compensation method for KV cache compression, maintains attention matching to assist the larger model and approximate marginal tokens, addressing irreversible eviction and marginal information over-compression issues.

general: title: Gumiho: A Hybrid Architecture to Prioritize Early Tokens in Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding (SPD) aims to accelerate the auto-regressive token generation process of a target Large Language Model (LLM) by predicting and verifying future tokens.
解码策略优化: abstract: Gumiho is a hybrid model that prioritizes early tokens in speculative decoding, using sophisticated serial Transformer heads for early draft tokens and lightweight parallel MLP heads for later tokens to improve accuracy and efficiency, fully validating the speed-up strategy.

general: "SpecKV" ... uses lookahead with a small draft model to enable precise KV cache dropping
"SpecPC" leverages draft model attention activations to identify and discard less important prompt tokens
"SpecKV-PC" combines both into cascaded compression for KV cache and prompt tokens

general: Large language models are increasingly capable of handling long-context inputs, but the memory overhead of KV cache remains a major bottleneck for general-purpose deployment ... UniGist, a gist token-based long context compression framework that removes the need for chunk-wise training, enabling the model to learn how to compress and utilize long-range context during training ... introduces a gist shift trick to transform the attention layout into a right-aligned block structure and develops a block-table-free sparse attention kernel ... supports one-pass training and flexible chunk sizes during inference, allowing efficient and adaptive context processing.

notes: Compresses KV cache context for long-sequence LLM inference via gist tokens and sparse attention.

general: HuggingFace summary says PARALLELPROMPT is a benchmark for measuring and exploiting intra-query parallelism in natural prompts to reduce latency in LLM serving systems with minimal quality loss, and that it ships an execution suite contrasting serial versus parallel strategies. general: ChunkKV将语义块作为KV cache压缩单位，保持完整上下文并通过层间索引重用降低计算开销，在LongBench等基准上精度提升并维持压缩比。

general: Scaling laws have shaped recent advances in machine learning by enabling predictable scaling of model performance based on model size, computation, and data volume, while the rise in computational cost for AI has motivated model compression techniques, notably quantization and sparsification, to mitigate the steep demands of large-scale training and inference.
模型压缩: This paper investigates the interplay between scaling laws and compression strategies, exploring whether a unified scaling framework can accurately predict model performance when training occurs over various compressed representations, such as sparse, scalar-quantized, sparse-quantized or even vector-quantized formats.

notes: Unified scaling laws and compression-specific training algorithms target compressed LLM representations rather than infrastructure or serving concerns.

上下文与缓存优化: 论文摘要指出 DeFT 通过 KV-Guided Grouping 避免重复加载共享前缀的 KV cache，并用 Flattened Tree KV Splitting 使 KV cache 在分区间均匀分布，从而大幅减少 KV cache IO 并提升 GPU 利用率。

notes: 针对树结构推理场景的 KV cache 复用与 load-balanced partitioning 进行优化。

general: Compression methods, including quantization, distillation, and pruning, improve the computational efficiency of large reasoning models (LRMs).
模型压缩: To uncover the effects of compression on reasoning performance, we benchmark quantized, distilled, and pruned DeepSeek-R1 models ... to interpret fine-grained causal relationships between weights and various reasoning capabilities, revealing which weights are most important for reasoning and how protecting a small subset raises accuracy.

notes: 论文针对 reasoning-oriented LLM 压缩（quantization/distillation/pruning）提出基于权重差异和 attribution patching 的分析，并通过实验证明某些权重保护策略能显著提升推理精度。

模型压缩: To mitigate this issue, we investigate the efficacy of compression when serving LoRAs.
We propose a method for the joint compression of LoRAs into a shared basis paired with LoRA-specific scaling matrices.
We extend our algorithm to learn clusters of LoRAs that are amenable to joint compression, allowing it to scale gracefully.

notes: LoRA 共享 basis + 缩放矩阵能在 GPU 内存有限情况下保持 80% throughput，体现模型压缩主线。

general: SpecEdge introduces an edge-assisted inference framework that splits LLM workloads between edge and server GPUs using a speculative decoding scheme.
系统与调度优化: SpecEdge employs proactive edge drafting to overlap edge token creation with server verification and pipeline-aware scheduling that interleaves multiple user requests to increase server-side throughput.

notes: Serving framework focuses on scheduling across edge and server GPUs, using speculative decoding to enable interleaved request processing.

模型压缩: 题目与摘要一致指出 SLiM 是面向 LLM 的 one-shot 量化+稀疏+低秩权重压缩框架，旨在在不重训的条件下降低内存与推理成本。

general: Post-training quantization (PTQ) of large language models (LLMs) holds the promise in reducing the prohibitive computational cost at inference time.
模型压缩: Quantization of all weight, activation and key-value (KV) cache tensors to 4-bit without significantly degrading generalizability is challenging... we propose ResQ, a PTQ method... identifies a low-rank subspace... keep the coefficients within this subspace in high precision while quantizing the rest to 4-bit... We show that this is a provably optimal mixed precision quantization scheme that minimizes error.

notes: ResQ targets PTQ for LLMs via mixed-precision quantization of parameters, activations, and KV cache.

general: 提出 OrthoRank 通过衡量 token 与 sink token 的正交性来动态选择重要 token，从而直接控制推理时要处理的上下文内容。
实验证明该 token 选择策略在相同稀疏率下比层剪枝有更低困惑度和更高零样本准确率，验证了上下文管理带来的推理效率提升。

notes: 核心贡献是基于 sink token 动态筛选 token 以减少推理上下文负担。

上下文与缓存优化: Multipole Attention accelerates autoregressive reasoning by computing exact attention only for the most important tokens while keeping approximate representations for the rest, explicitly targeting the KV cache pressure from thousands-token chain-of-thought generation in Large Reasoning Models to retain accuracy during long-context inference. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))

The method clusters semantically similar key vectors, uses the cluster centroids both to identify important keys and approximate the remaining ones, and applies a fast reclustering process over new and previous tokens so that attention to earlier outputs can be accelerated, reducing the cost of long-context attention. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))

notes: The paper’s core contribution is a KV-attention approximation strategy for LRMs that clusters past and newly generated tokens to limit exact attention computation while preserving accuracy in long-context reasoning. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))

模型压缩: We propose PruneNet, a novel model compression method that reformulates model pruning as a policy learning process, decoupling it from architecture-specific calibration datasets while learning a stochastic policy to assess parameter importance.

notes: PruneNet compresses LLaMA-2-7B rapidly while retaining zero-shot and downstream performance, showing structured pruning via policy learning as the core contribution.

general: Sorbet introduces a transformer-based spiking language model that is more neuromorphic hardware-compatible and validates it via GLUE and ablations to show its energy-efficient edge inference potential.
模型压缩: By leveraging knowledge distillation and model quantization, Sorbet achieved a highly compressed binary weight model that maintains competitive performance while achieving 27.16× energy savings compared to BERT.

notes: Main contribution is quantized/binary-weight spiking transformer for energy-efficient inference.

notes: 主要贡献是面向巨型语言模型的结构化二值化压缩方法，重点在更低比特率下保持精度。

general: Abstract states RAPID targets long-context LLM inference by combining retrieval-augmented generation with speculative decoding to handle expensive KV cache operations.
解码策略优化: RAPID introduces a RAG drafter that speculates the target LLM’s generation and inference-time knowledge transfer, explicitly extending speculative decoding to long-context settings with retrieval-augmented drafts.

notes: RAPID’s core contribution is adapting speculative decoding via retrieval-augmented drafters for long-context inference, without focusing on caching, kernel, or system scheduling changes.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) deployed for long-context inference face the KV cache as the primary GPU memory and latency bottleneck because the full cache must be loaded at each decoding step.

QuantSpec introduces a self-speculative decoding framework where the draft model shares architecture but runs on a hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache and weights, yielding consistent end-to-end speedups up to ∼2.5× and ~1.3× KV memory reduction.
上下文与缓存优化: QuantSpec’s core acceleration comes from a hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache that lets the speculated decoding process maintain high acceptance rates while cutting cache size and load cost, outperforming prior sparse-KV approaches.

notes: 主研究在于通过层级量化 KV cache 加速长期上下文推理的 speculative decoding，使上下文/缓存开销成为核心优化杠杆。

general: Abstract frames the bottleneck as KV cache size in Transformer LLMs and motivates inference-time hyper-scaling via KV cache compression for longer/parallel generations within the same compute budget.
上下文与缓存优化: They introduce Dynamic Memory Sparsification (DMS), a KV cache sparsification method that achieves 8× compression in 1K steps by delaying token eviction and implicitly merging representations, directly targeting cache efficiency.

notes: DMS is validated on multiple LLM families, improving accuracy at fixed memory/latency by compressing the KV cache during inference.

系统与调度优化: SERE dynamically reduces the number of active experts in an input-aware manner by re-routing tokens from secondary experts to their most similar primary counterparts.
It also leverages similarity patterns to identify and preserve critical experts, thereby preventing capability loss, enabling dynamic expert skipping based on batch-level expert redundancy.

notes: 针对 MoE 生产推理的批解码阶段，通过专家重路由优化 serving 负载，配套自定义 CUDA kernel 便于在 vLLM 一行代码集成。

general: Optimizing the Key-Value (KV) cache of the Large Language Model (LLM) has been considered critical to saving the cost of inference.

SqueezeAttention jointly optimizes the KV-cache from sequence-wise and layer-wise dimensions, allocating layer-specific budgets in inference to reduce memory by 30%-70% and boost throughput up to 2.2×.
上下文与缓存优化: By identifying layer importance, SqueezeAttention precisely optimizes the KV-cache allocation among layers on-the-fly and incorporates sequence-wise compression for each layer’s budget.

notes: Layer-wise KV-cache allocation is the core method for LLM inference memory/throughput improvements.

上下文与缓存优化: Large language models (LLMs) with long context windows have gained significant attention. However, the KV cache, stored to avoid re-computation, becomes a bottleneck.
MagicPIG significantly reduces the workload of attention computation while preserving high accuracy for diverse tasks.
MagicPIG stores the LSH hash tables and runs the attention computation on the CPU, which allows it to serve longer contexts and larger batch sizes with high approximation accuracy.

notes: MagicPIG targets KV cache/attention overhead via LSH sampling to sustain very long contexts and large batches, so the core leverage is context and cache management.

general: Title states the work is a joint optimization for KV cache compression in large vision-language models.
Abstract explains that KV cache expansion in LVLMs creates a critical memory bottleneck that limits deployment scalability.

notes: Targets KV cache compression for large vision-language models to make long multi-modal sequences deployable.

general: CDPruner training-free visual token pruning maximizes conditional diversity via DPP to select instruction-relevant tokens for multimodal LLMs, reducing FLOPs and latency while preserving accuracy.
上下文与缓存优化: Token pruning removes redundant visual tokens by optimizing conditional similarity and diversity, directly shrinking the input context that inference must process.

notes: CDPruner demonstrates a general visual-token pruning strategy for MLLMs, improving efficiency while keeping performance.

general: Title ’Efficient Multimodal Spatial Reasoning via Dynamic and Asymmetric Routing’ and the abstract’s VoT description anchor the work firmly in multimodal/vision-language reasoning, without surfacing any of the six specified optimization levers.

notes: Available text lacks any clear claim about cache/context, decoding, system, kernel, structure, or compression optimizations, so no preference label is assigned.

general: Extrapolating ultra-long contexts ... suffers from the attention sink ... we propose ParallelComp, a parallel long-context compression method that effectively overcomes the memory bottleneck ... enabling 8B-parameter LLMs to extrapolate from 8K to 128K tokens on a single A100 80GB GPU in a training-free setting.

ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism, with a systematic theoretical and empirical analysis of attention biases in parallel attention.
上下文与缓存优化: ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism to mitigate attention sink and recency/middle biases under ultra-long contexts.

notes: Focuses on training-free chunk/token eviction via parallel KV cache management to extend LLM contexts to 128K tokens with minimal memory pressure and high throughput.

general: We demonstrate that unstructured sparsity significantly improves KV cache compression for LLMs, enabling sparsity levels up to 70% without compromising accuracy or requiring fine-tuning.
KV cache size is the major bottleneck in decode performance due to high memory overhead for large context lengths.
上下文与缓存优化: Our custom attention kernel coupled with the bitmap-based format delivers substantial compression of KV cache up to 45% of dense inference and thereby enables longer context lengths and increased tokens/sec throughput of up to 2.23× compared to dense inference.

notes: Focuses on pruning and sparse compression for KV cache to reduce context/cache overhead during decoding.

general: Efficient real-world deployments of large language models (LLMs) rely on Key-Value (KV) caching ... The cached vectors can take up tens of gigabytes ... we aim to improve Key & Value compression by exploiting dependencies between keys and values ... AQUA-KV ... adaptive quantization for Key-Value caches ... significantly improves compression rates while maintaining high accuracy.

notes: Authors focus on adaptive KV cache quantization for LMs (AQUA-KV) to reduce long-context memory while preserving quality; label chosen because the core lever is KV cache compression.

general: MagicDec deploys speculative decoding across high-throughput long-context inference, analyzing bottleneck shifts and using intelligent drafting strategies to boost speedup (up to 2.51× on LLaMA-3.1-8B) while preserving accuracy.
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding with a draft model, sparse KV cache, and a theoretically selected drafting strategy is the central mechanism MagicDec validates to reduce latency and increase throughput against long-context serving challenges.

notes: Speculative decoding is treated as the main optimization lever, with draft/model bottleneck analysis driving the observed speedups.

general: Disaggregating the prefill and decoding phases represents an effective new paradigm for generative inference of large language models (LLM).
This approach offers significant system advantages, such as eliminating prefill-decoding interference and optimizing resource allocation across heterogeneous GPUs.
Focuses on deploying disaggregated inference across heterogeneous GPU clusters, i.e., system/scheduling optimization.
系统与调度优化: Deploying the disaggregated inference paradigm across a group of heterogeneous GPUs remains a challenging open problem, emphasizing the need for improved system scheduling and resource allocation.

notes: Focuses on deploying disaggregated inference across heterogeneous GPU clusters, i.e., system/scheduling optimization.

模型结构侧推理优化: Causal attention has become a foundational mechanism in autoregressive Vision-Language models (VLMs) … existing causal mask-based strategies are inherited from large language models (LLMs) where they are tailored for text-only decoding, and their adaptation to vision tokens is insufficiently addressed in the prefill stage.

Strictly masking future positions for vision queries introduces overly rigid constraints, which hinder the model’s ability to leverage future context that often contains essential semantic cues for accurate inference.

notes: The paper rethinks causal mask attention for vision-language inference to relax rigid future masking and better incorporate vision-token context during decoding.

general: Title/abstract describe SWIFT as an on-the-fly self-speculative decoding algorithm that adaptively skips intermediate LLM layers during inference to accelerate decoding without auxiliary models.

notes: 主贡献是 speculative decoding 层跳策略，直接改 token 生成路径以提速。

general: CAKE frames KV cache eviction as a "cake-slicing problem" that adapts per-layer cache budgets and tracks token importance over time to keep quality with only 3.2% of the KV cache while improving latency over 10× on 128K contexts ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/dfae940651f3e690a12e19c874edad7c-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: The paper details Cascading and Adaptive KV cache Eviction that allocates cache resources across diverse attention layers and manages memory constraints in a cascading way, proving the main optimization lever is KV cache eviction rather than structural or system changes ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/dfae940651f3e690a12e19c874edad7c-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

notes: ICLR 2025 CAKE validates the cache-eviction strategy on LongBench and NeedleBench, showing the focus is on contextual cache management to keep model performance while reducing memory usage and decoding latency ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/dfae940651f3e690a12e19c874edad7c-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

general: TidalDecode introduces position persistent sparse attention to reduce token selection overhead while matching full-attention quality on diverse LLMs and tasks.
解码策略优化: TidalDecode adds token selection layers that perform full attention to identify high-scoring tokens, letting other layers reuse the pre-selected tokens for sparse attention, cutting decoding latency up to 2.1×.

notes: Main contribution is a decoding-time sparse attention pipeline that persistently selects tokens across layers, shrinking KV cache work without new system or kernel changes.

general: HashAttention reduces attention tokens by identifying pivotal tokens per query, improving inference efficiency with minimal quality loss.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract says HashAttention encodes keys/queries into Hamming space to select pivotal tokens, using only them to compute attention and cutting tokens used up to 16×.

notes: Selective token identification and sparse attention is the main optimization lever.

general: Title and abstract describe a head-level KV cache compression approach (HeadKV/HeadKV-R2) targeting Large Language Models to reduce KV cache memory without losing performance on long-context QA tasks.
上下文与缓存优化: Head-level KV cache compression selectively retains important key-value information per attention head, keeping just 1.5% of the KV cache while maintaining 97% performance, showing that cache trimming is the core optimization.

general: CogVLA introduces instruction-driven routing and sparsification to align vision-language-action modalities and reduce computation for VLA models.
上下文与缓存优化: Encoder-FiLM based Aggregation Routing injects instructions into the vision encoder to selectively aggregate and compress dual-stream visual tokens, yielding an instruction-aware latent representation.
LLM-FiLM based Pruning Routing prunes instruction-irrelevant visually grounded tokens, achieving token-level sparsity to keep compressed perception inputs efficient.

notes: Token compression/pruning across vision-language inputs is the dominant efficiency lever.

general: Abstract frames sequential recommendation as predicting the next item from user interaction history.

general: Title: AttentionPredictor: Temporal Patterns Matter for KV Cache Compression; Abstract: With the development of large language models (LLMs), efficient inference through Key-Value (KV) cache compression has attracted considerable attention, especially for long-context generation.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract highlights efficient inference via Key-Value (KV) cache compression for long-context generation, indicating the main contribution is context/KV cache optimization.

general: Sparse RAG encodes retrieved documents in parallel and only attends to highly relevant caches when decoding, reducing the number of documents loaded during decoding and cutting the computation cost of retrieval-augmented inference.
上下文与缓存优化: The sparse mechanism filters out undesirable contexts and speeds up RAG inference by limiting attention to selected caches, thereby reducing the context the model must load during decoding and sharpening focus on relevant information.

notes: Sparse RAG focuses on selecting and attending to a small subset of retrieved caches to accelerate and improve inference quality.

general: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance across a versatile set of tasks. A key challenge in accelerating VLMs is storing and accessing the large Key-Value (KV) cache that encodes long visual contexts.
We propose VL-Cache, a novel KV cache compression recipe tailored for accelerating VLM inference, investigating sparsity patterns and introducing layer-adaptive cache budget allocation.
上下文与缓存优化: We introduce a layer-adaptive sparsity-aware cache budget allocation method that effectively distributes the limited cache budget across different layers, further reducing KV cache size without compromising accuracy.

A modality-aware token scoring policy better evaluates token importance; retaining only 10% of KV cache achieves accuracy comparable to that with full cache while reducing GPU memory footprint by 90%.

Efficient generative inference in LLMs is impeded by the growing memory demands of Key-Value (KV) cache, especially for longer sequences ... D₂O dynamically determine which layers should avoid excessive eviction via our proposed dynamic allocation strategy ... compensation mechanism that maintains a similarity threshold to re-discriminate the importance of currently discarded tokens, determining whether they should be recalled and merged with similar tokens.

notes: D₂O optimizes KV cache eviction without fine-tuning, achieving significant memory savings and >3× throughput improvements on long-context inference benchmarks.

general: Title: QuEST: Stable Training of LLMs with 1-Bit Weights and Activations
Abstract: One approach to reducing the massive costs of large language models (LLMs) is the use of quantized or sparse representations for training or deployment.
模型压缩: Title indicates stable training of LLMs with 1-bit weights and activations.
Abstract highlights using quantized or sparse representations (weights/activations) for training/deployment.

notes: 核心贡献是为 LLM 训练引入 1-bit 权重与激活的稳定量化，对应模型压缩优化。

模型压缩: 提出 LeanQuant（一种 loss-error-aware 的量化方法），旨在在不依赖专用内核的前提下更准确、可扩展地量化 LLM，从而降低内存与推理成本并适配主流框架。

notes: 主贡献是面向 LLM 的后训练量化，提升准确度与兼容性。

general: The increasing demand for long-context generation has made the KV cache in large language models a bottleneck in memory consumption.
We propose PolarQuant ... provides a new perspective for key cache quantization and efficiently addresses the outlier dilemma.
上下文与缓存优化: PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle, rather than quantizing original key vectors directly.
PolarQuant achieves superior efficiency in KV cache quantization and accelerates the decoding process by turning the query-key inner product into a table lookup.

notes: Paper introduces PolarQuant to quantize the LLM KV cache, reducing memory cost while accelerating decoding, so it qualifies as a cache/context optimization effort.

上下文与缓存优化: Transformer-based large language models cache context as key-value pairs, and growing context lengths expand KV cache sizes, raising memory overhead and attention latency.
KVzip is a query-agnostic KV cache eviction method that reconstructs original contexts to quantify KV importance, then evicts low-importance pairs to compress the cache.

notes: ['Query-agnostic cache reconstruction is evaluated across multiple LLMs and long contexts, showing 3–4× cache size reduction with ~2× FlashAttention latency speedup.']

general: Speculative decoding methods have recently shown promise in accelerating inference without compromising the output distribution.
We introduce a novel polybasic speculative decoding framework, underpinned by a comprehensive theoretical analysis, to optimize multi-model token generation and computational cost.
解码策略优化: Inference latency stands as a critical bottleneck in the deployment of LLMs, and speculative decoding is presented as the core method to accelerate inference.
Our theoretical investigation exposes and optimizes the interaction between model capabilities, acceptance lengths, and computational cost within a polybasic speculative decoding system.

notes: 核心贡献是构建多模型的 polybasic speculative decoding 理论框架，以提升 LLM 推理速度。

general: 论文通过引入 Lookahead Reasoning，在长链 CoT 推理的 LLM 解码端添加 step-level speculative decoding，直接瞄准 LLM 的 autoregressive 解码瓶颈来提升并行度和吞吐。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))
解码策略优化: Lookahead Reasoning 由草稿模型并行生成未来 reasoning steps，再用 verifier 校验并接受多个步骤，整个流程直接改变 token/step 的生成与验证顺序，并与 token-level speculative decoding 叠加，加速解码策略。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))

notes: 论文在 GSM8K、AIME 等基准上展示与 token-level SD 组合后将 speedup 从 1.4x 推升到 2.1x，同时保持答案质量，说明主方法集中在 speculative decoding 的解码策略优化上。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))

general: 标题/摘要指明 Palu 是面向 LLM 推理的 KV-Cache 压缩框架，利用低秩投影减少推理期内存占用并在运行时重建 key/value。

general: The paper targets transformer sparse attention inference and introduces a delta correction to align sparse outputs with quadratic attention, without framing the contribution as any of the six specified optimization levers.

general: ThinKV is a thought-adaptive KV cache compression framework that adapts token precision and evicts less critical tokens to manage the KV cache growth caused by long-output reasoning models.

Experiments on DeepSeek-R1-Distill, GPT-OSS, and NVIDIA AceReason show ThinKV achieves near-lossless accuracy with under 5% of the original KV cache while improving throughput up to 5.8× over SoTA baselines.
上下文与缓存优化: ThinKV applies a hybrid quantization–eviction strategy keyed to thought importance and reuses evicted tokens’ slots via a custom kernel, explicitly operating on KV cache compression.

notes: 主要贡献是面向推理模型的 KV cache 压缩与精度/驱逐策略，kernel 只是为了高效实现该压缩。

general: As the length of input text grows, the key-value (KV) cache in LLMs imposes prohibitive GPU memory costs and limits long-context inference on resource-constrained devices.

notes: 聚焦压缩/优化 LLM 的 KV 缓存以支持长上下文推理，因此主要对象是 LLM，唯一偏好标签为上下文与缓存优化。

general: SepLLM compresses segments between separator tokens into the separators themselves to eliminate redundant tokens and accelerate inference.
Evaluations with Llama-3-8B show SepLLM cuts KV cache usage by over 50% on GSM8K-CoT while preserving performance and handling streams up to 4M tokens.
上下文与缓存优化: By condensing segments into separator tokens and trimming unnecessary context, SepLLM significantly compresses KV cache and scales to extremely long sequences.

notes: 核心贡献在于通过 separator token 结构压缩上下文/KV cache，保持性能的同时扩展至百万级 token 流。

general: ScaleKV 分析 VAR 转换器各层的注意力模式，将其分为需要更多缓存的 drafters 和可用更小缓存的 refiners，从而实施分层缓存管理。
针对 Infinity 文本图像 VAR，ScaleKV 将 KV cache 内存压缩到原来的 10% 仍保持像素级保真度。
上下文与缓存优化: ScaleKV 通过识别不同尺度的 attention 需求，提供 scale-aware 的 KV cache 压缩机制，属于上下文/缓存管理的核心优化。
评估显示相比原始 VAR pipeline，压缩后的 KV cache 内存需求显著下降，是为减小上下文/缓存开销所做的主贡献。

notes: ScaleKV 的核心贡献是对 Visual Autoregressive 推理过程中的 KV cache 进行分层压缩与管理。

general: CodeGEMM replaces dequantization-based GEMM with a codebook-centric kernel that gathers precomputed centroid-activation inner products, cutting per-element lookups and on-chip pressure to explore latency–memory–accuracy trade-offs.

上下文与缓存优化: PPE explicitly encodes 3D positions so each compressed token preserves different visual positions, enabling a cascade token compression strategy that reduces redundant visual tokens while keeping spatiotemporal structure.

notes: PPE is a parameter-free encoding operator that compresses visual tokens for MLLMs, making token-level context management its main optimization focus.

general: Phase-aware precision allocation separates prefill and decoding, and Progressive Mixed-Precision Decoding gradually lowers precision deeper into the generated sequence, yielding up to 8× throughput gain on an LLM-optimized NPU and 1.4–12.2× speedup on GPUs while preserving output quality for mobile-scale LLMs. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Paper-Conference.pdf))
模型压缩: Quantization is applied per phase and progressively over tokens with precision-switching schedulers that minimize average bitwidth subject to quality constraints, exploiting the decoder’s increasing fault tolerance to reduce numerical precision during autoregressive generation. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: PMPD is fundamentally a dynamic weight-precision scheme for decoding, so its core lever is model compression rather than system or decoding-strategy changes. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Paper-Conference.pdf))

general: An efficient private GPT never autoregressively decodes; the client uses a public model to propose tokens that a private model then securely verifies for acceptance, improving secure decoding efficiency while retaining privacy.
解码策略优化: The study’s core innovation is a public decoding plus secure verification pipeline, with a private sampling protocol and knowledge-distillation alignment to raise the acceptance ratio of tokens proposed by the public model, which directly alters the decoding process.

notes: Focuses on reworking the secure decoding workflow rather than system-level serving or model compression.

模型压缩: ParetoQ框架在1/1.58/2/3/4位量化下统一比较并通过优化量化函数提升极低位LLM的精度/大小权衡。

notes: 极低位量化方法为主要贡献。

general: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is an effective technique for compressing large language models (LLMs).
模型压缩: SliM-LLM is a salience-driven mixed-precision quantization framework assigning group-wise bit-widths by salience.

notes: Focuses on salience-driven mixed-precision quantization for LLMs.

general: SpeCache offloads the complete KV cache to CPU memory and dynamically fetches important KV pairs back into VRAM via a low-precision copy to manage long-context LLM inference without retraining.
上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache speculatively predicts the KV pairs the next token will attend to so it can prefetch them before each decoding step, enabling parallel prefetching and computation while reducing VRAM usage and avoiding information forgetting.

notes: SpeCache’s core lever is KV cache management with speculative prefetching across CPU/GPU to sustain long-sequence decoding.

general: Paper targets LLM serving, introducing the training-free HiP attention mechanism plus integration into throughput-optimized frameworks and KV cache offloading to serve extremely long-context Llama-3.1-8B workloads without extra training, indicating the work optimizes LLM inference cost and memory for long contexts. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: HiP hierarchically pruned attention performs score-locality-aware top-k key selection in O(T log T) and sparse attention, while a complementary KV cache offloading scheme keeps only O(log T) hot tokens on GPU to reduce memory pressure, so the main lever is managing attention/context/caching for long sequences. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: Context/attention pruning and cache management constitute the core optimization validated across benchmarks and hardware-aware deployments. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))

general: Large language models face growing challenges in efficient generative inference due to the increasing memory demands of Key-Value (KV) caches, especially for long sequences.
上下文与缓存优化: ReST-KV introduces robust KV cache eviction with layer-wise output reconstruction and spatial-temporal smoothing to relieve long-sequence memory pressure.

notes: KV cache eviction is the core mechanism to handle long-context inference.

general: Inference with Transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) on long sequences is both costly and slow due to the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism.
Star Attention integrates seamlessly with most Transformer-based LLMs trained with global attention, reducing memory requirements and inference time by up to 11x while preserving 97-100% of accuracy.
上下文与缓存优化: We introduce Star Attention, a two-phase block-sparse approximation that improves computational efficiency by sharding attention across multiple hosts while minimizing communication overhead.

In the first phase, the context is processed using blockwise-local attention across hosts, in parallel. In the second phase, query and response tokens attend to all prior cached tokens through sequence-global attention.

notes: Based on the provided title and abstract.

general: Title: Accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models via Dynamic Visual-Token Exit and the Empirical Findings
Abstract: In this paper, we study the visual redundancy problem of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) from the perspective of attention behaviors.
上下文与缓存优化: Title highlights dynamic visual-token exit, which is a token-level selection/pruning mechanism targeting visual redundancy in multimodal LLMs.

notes: Core contribution is token-level management of visual context rather than decoding, kernel, or system scheduling changes.

general: RetroAttention revises past attention outputs with newly arrived KV entries and keeps a lightweight output cache so prior queries can be supplemented with more context at minimal latency.
上下文与缓存优化: The paper targets the KV cache bottleneck in long-context inference by retrospectively updating cached outputs, breaking the fixed-attention-output paradigm and continually correcting approximations during decoding.

general: Paper focuses on KV caching for LLM inference, modeling eviction versus routing trade-offs in multi-LLM serving under limited memory. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: Proposes randomized KV cache eviction plus learning-based routing to balance hit rate and load, showing large hit-rate and throughput gains across benchmarks. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))

notes: ['Joint model and algorithms for cache eviction and routing deliver latency, TTFT, and throughput wins, confirming the cache focus. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))']

general: Speculative decoding is an effective and lossless method for LLM inference acceleration; EasySpec implements a layer-parallel speculation strategy that breaks inter-layer dependencies so multiple layers run simultaneously on multiple GPUs, keeping verification and cache calibration intact.
解码策略优化: EasySpec speeds up the drafting stage with multi-layer speculative decoding and iterative draft/verification, achieving peak 4.17x decoding for large open-source LLMs while preserving base-model distributions.

notes: Authors’ main contribution is the layer-parallel speculative decoding flow that overlaps draft layers across GPUs to accelerate inference.

general: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) rely on key–value (KV) caching to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive inference.
The cache size grows linearly with the input sequence length, quickly becoming a bottleneck for long-context tasks.
上下文与缓存优化: LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores for KV cache eviction without costly draft generation, ensuring superior accuracy and lower eviction cost.

notes: Focuses on long-context KV cache eviction accuracy and cost reduction for LLM inference.

上下文与缓存优化: RocketKV is a training-free KV cache compression strategy with a two-stage pipeline (coarse-grain permanent token eviction followed by hybrid sparse attention) that shrinks the KV cache size for long-context decoding.

notes: Addresses long-context LLM decode-phase bottlenecks via KV cache compression, achieving up to 400× compression and 32.6% peak memory reduction.

general: Autoregressive Transformers rely on Key-Value (KV) caching to accelerate inference, but the KV cache grows linearly with context length, causing excessive memory and bandwidth pressure.
上下文与缓存优化: The paper targets the linear growth of the KV cache by introducing constant-sized KV caches for extended responses, avoiding lossy dropping or compression of distant tokens.

notes: Primary contribution is constant-sized KV caching to hold needed context without growing memory usage.

general: HShare proposes hierarchical sharing of critical KV cache token indices across layers, heads, and queries to cut the runtime cost of query-aware sparse self-attention.
Greedy algorithm dynamically configures layer-level and head-level sharing during decoding, yielding up to 8.6× faster self-attention and 2.7× end-to-end throughput versus FlashAttention2/GPT-fast.
上下文与缓存优化: Frequent KV cache retrieval drives LLM inference inefficiency; HShare shares critical KV token indices hierarchically so dynamic sparsity no longer recomputes tokens per attention.
Sharing configuration tuning balances criticality across neighboring queries, layers, and heads, significantly shrinking KV cache overhead while matching accuracy.

notes: Confirmed the paper’s main lever is hierarchical KV cache token sharing during decoding for large language models, so the context/cache optimization tag is the sole preference label with positive evidence.

general: Abstract emphasizes post-training compression and the study of calibration data’s impact on preserving LLM reasoning and code generation capabilities.
模型压缩: The paper proposes a calibration data curation framework that enhances existing post-training compression methods to better preserve critical LLM capabilities.

notes: Main contribution is selecting representative/diverse calibration data to support model compression without harming key LLM abilities.

general: LONGGEN integrates length extension with KV cache reduction via a 1/3 full + 2/3 sparse hybrid architecture, yielding 1.55x training speedup, 62% KV cache reduction, 1.67x prefilling acceleration, and 1.41x decoding acceleration on Llama-2 7B/70B long contexts. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: The method emphasizes GPU-friendly sparse attention/KV-reduced layers that maintain token access while saving cache budget, directly shrinking KV cache memory and speeding inference for long-context serving. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: ['Context extension from 4K to 128K is achieved with lightweight 5B-token training and custom Triton kernels inspired by FlashAttention-2 to realize the sparse attention design. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))']

模型压缩: 通过剪枝加蒸馏将大规模 DiT 教师压缩到精简的 AdcSR 骨干，AdcVSR 在参数上减少 95%，推理速度提升 8 倍，表明压缩是主干优化杠杆。

notes: 剪枝与蒸馏的压缩流程是作者提出并验证的核心方法。

上下文与缓存优化: REFORM incrementally processes input chunks while maintaining a compressed KV cache, constructs cross-layer context embeddings, and gathers essential tokens via similarity matching before selectively recomputing the KV cache to handle long contexts efficiently.

notes: Long-context inference focus; compression and selective recomputation of KV cache are the core optimization lever.

general: Title/abstract emphasize hardware-aware deployment of linear recurrent neural networks on edge devices (latency/energy reduction) but do not present one of the six preferred optimization contributions (decoding, context/cache, system scheduling, operator kernels, structural inference, or model compression).

notes: Paper focuses on efficient edge inference of linear RNNs without detailing a validated preference-label optimization.

上下文与缓存优化: LLaVA-Mini introduces modality pre-fusion to fuse visual information into text tokens in advance, enabling the extreme compression of vision tokens fed to the LLM backbone down to just one token.

notes: LLaVA-Mini’s core contribution is shrinking the number of vision tokens entering the backbone, so it targets token/context compression rather than a new serving/system layer.

上下文与缓存优化: PM-KVQ: Progressive Mixed-precision KV Cache Quantization for Long-CoT LLMs（标题）直指对 KV cache 进行量化优化，属于上下文/缓存调度改进

notes: 根据标题推断主贡献是 KV cache 量化以减轻长 CoT LLM 上下文成本，摘要仅提及动机，缺乏其它细节；据此选定最贴切的偏好标签。

general: AdaDecode accelerates LLM decoding by adaptively generating tokens at intermediate layers when confidence is high, letting the next token’s computation begin immediately while deferring and parallelizing remaining layers with verification to preserve output parity.

notes: Focuses on autoregressive decoding flow without extra models or parameter changes; the main leverage is adaptive early token prediction and parallelized layer execution to cut latency.

general: Title 'Adaptive Pruning of Pretrained Transformer via Differential Inclusions' plus abstract describing compression of large pretrained transformers to cut inference cost indicates the focus is on transformer-based foundation models (LLMs).

Abstract: 'Current compression algorithms prune transformers ... results in high computational costs ... we propose pruning of pretrained transformers ... based on a differential inclusion for a mask parameter.'
模型压缩: 'To achieve effective pruning, we segment the transformers into paired modules ... and apply low-rank compression to these pairs, maintaining the output structure while enabling structural compression within the inner states.'
'This dynamic can generate the whole regularization solution path of the mask parameter, whose support set identifies the network structure ... offering greater flexibility ...'

notes: SPP builds a single-stage differential-inclusion-based pruning path that generates transformer families with variable sparsity and applies low-rank compression to module pairs.

general: Meeting service-level objectives (SLOs) in Large Language Models (LLMs) serving is critical … this paper proposes NestedFP … overlaying FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters … specialized GEMM kernel … provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.
系统与调度优化: NestedFP provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.

notes: 在 LLM 服务层面通过双精度模型动态切换与内存复用来满足 SLO，是系统级调度优化。

模型压缩: Paper targets activation outliers that hinder INT4 weight-activation quantization for large language models, motivating a training-free activation smoother to improve quantization accuracy.

general: Cake introduces a KV cache loading system that balances computation and I/O resources to reduce Time to First Token.
Adaptive scheduling integrates with non-prefix caching requests and improves throughput across hardware, datasets, and storage conditions.
上下文与缓存优化: Prefix caching stores KV caches for reuse but suffers from I/O latency; Cake’s bidirectional scheduler dynamically balances KV cache computation and loading to optimize long-context inference.

notes: KV cache loading/scheduling is the core optimization lever, so the context-and-cache label is selected.

模型压缩: introduce novel methods for converting existing LLMs into smaller "Recursive Transformers" that share parameters across layers
Relaxed Recursive Transformers add flexibility to the layer tying constraint via depth-wise LoRA modules while still preserving the compactness of the overall model

notes: 重点在参数共享带来的压缩，以 layer-wise LoRA 维持性能；Continuous Depth-wise Batching/early exiting 是递归结构带来的推理优化附属机制。

general: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly constrained by memory and latency bottlenecks, motivating the need for quantization techniques that flexibly balance accuracy and efficiency.
模型压缩: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly constrained by memory and latency bottlenecks, motivating the need for quantization techniques that flexibly balance accuracy and efficiency.

notes: Paper targets flexible binary quantization for LLM inference seen as a model-compression optimization.

general: The proliferation of long-context large language models (LLMs) exposes a key bottleneck: the rapidly expanding key-value cache during decoding, which imposes heavy memory and latency costs.

LycheeDecode, an efficient decoding method centered on a fine-grained hybrid-head attention mechanism, employs a hardware-efficient top-k selection strategy so retrieval heads dynamically identify crucial tokens and sparse heads reuse them for efficient computation.
上下文与缓存优化: LycheeDecode addresses the cache growth by partitioning attention heads into retrieval heads that find crucial tokens and sparse heads that reuse them, preserving functional diversity while reducing the overhead of the expanding key-value cache.

notes: Main contribution is reducing KV cache pressure through hybrid-head token selection and reuse.

general: Lexico is a KV cache compression method that uses sparse coding with a universal dictionary.
上下文与缓存优化: It approximates KV cache via sparse combinations from a small dictionary, achieving 15-25% memory with 90-95% performance.

notes: Sparse coding and orthogonal matching pursuit keep accuracy high even when compressing KV cache down to 15-25% memory.

general: Abstract frames the contribution as accelerating inference for offloaded large language models on memory-limited GPUs via speculative decoding and substitute low-bit layers, confirming the primary object is LLMs. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))
解码策略优化: SubSpec builds a highly aligned draft model by generating substitute layers and shares KV cache so it can propose draft tokens that the target LLM verifies in parallel, directly modifying the decoding/token generation flow for lossless acceleration. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))

notes: Training-free substitute speculative decoding for offloaded LLMs delivers reported 9.1×–12.5× speedups while preserving accuracy. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))

general: Autoregressive decoding is bottlenecked by its sequential nature; speculative decoding uses a fast draft model to predict upcoming tokens and verifies them in parallel with the target model.
解码策略优化: Speculative speculative decoding (SSD) parallelizes speculation and verification by predicting likely verification outcomes while verification is ongoing, allowing immediately returning speculations when predictions match and eliminating speculation overhead.

notes: SSD/Saguaro directly targets decoding strategy by overlapping verification and speculation to remove sequential bottlenecks.

general: Serving large language models (LLMs) at scale necessitates efficient key-value (KV) cache management, so we introduce KVTC, a lightweight transform coder that compresses KV caches for compact on-GPU and off-GPU storage.

KVTC exploits redundancies in KV caches, combining PCA-based feature decorrelation, adaptive quantization, and entropy coding to achieve up to 20x compression while keeping reasoning and long-context accuracy across Llama 3.1, Mistral-NeMo, and R1-Qwen 2.5 and outperforming inference-time baselines such as token eviction, quantization, and SVD-based methods.

notes: KV cache compression is the core method validated, making context/cache optimization the single strongest labeled contribution.

general: GateSkip introduces per-branch sigmoid-linear residual-stream gates that compress outputs before re-entering the residual stream, enabling token-wise layer skipping.
解码策略优化: During inference we rank tokens by the gate and skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget, yielding adaptive compute savings while retaining accuracy.

notes: GateSkip fine-tunes pretrained decoder-only models with differentiable gates to skip layers selectively at inference time, keeping quality while cutting compute and complementing other compression techniques.

general: Privacy-preserving gateway mediates third-party LLM prompts, anonymizes sensitive data, interacts securely with LLMs, and reconstructs responses within attested encrypted memory.
Materials science text mining (MSTM) ... we propose MatDuck, a simple and effective approach for Zero-Shot MSTM by evoking material knowledge within Large Language Models (LLMs).
negative: MatDuck centers on descriptor generation and code-style in-context learning for zero-shot tasks, with no new decoding, caching, kernel, system scheduling, or compression optimizations described.

notes: No single preferred optimization lever from the specified six labels is present.

general: High-resolution Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are widely used... Processing such a large number of visual tokens poses significant computational challenges, particularly for resource-constrained commodity GPUs.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose High-Resolution Early Dropping (HiRED), a plug-and-play token-dropping method designed to operate within a fixed token budget... leverage the attention of the CLS token in the vision transformer (ViT) to assess the visual content of the image partitions and allocate an optimal token budget for each partition accordingly, selecting the most informative visual tokens from each partition within the allocated budget and passing them to the subsequent Large Language Model (LLM).

notes: HiRED explicitly drops less-informative visual tokens under a tight budget, so the authors focus on token/attention budget management rather than serving, decoding, or kernel-specific efforts.

general: 摘要指出为处理超高清多曝光动态图像而切分长序列输入，并采用 attention cache 再压缩缓存，目的在资源有限的单张 GPU 上高效完成任务。
