general: 提出 Output-adaptive Calibration (OAC) 将模型输出纳入校准过程，基于输出交叉熵损失构造量化误差，并在合理假设下近似输出自适应 Hessian 以降低计算复杂度。
模型压缩: OAC 使用输出自适应的 Hessian 更新权重矩阵并检测关键权重，从而保持模型输出，在极低精度（如 2-bit 和二值）量化下优于 SpQR 与 BiLLM 等最新 baselines。

notes: OAC 的主干仍是 post-training quantization 里优化权重更新和敏感度识别，因此主标签为模型压缩。

general: Title/abstract explain MPQ-DM as mixed-precision quantization for diffusion models to run under extremely low bit-widths (2-4 bits) and recover accuracy while reducing computation/storage.
模型压缩: Abstract describes Outlier-Driven Mixed Quantization (OMQ) and Time-Smoothed Relation Distillation (TRD) specifically for low-bit quantization, claiming significant accuracy/FID improvements compared to other quantization methods.

notes: MPQ-DM focuses on quantizing diffusion parameters (bit-width allocation + distillation) to restore accuracy under aggressive compression; this is why the classification is 生成模型 + 模型压缩.

general: MPTM策略评估多模态prompt与token的接近关系，用于删除冗余token并保留关键信息，显著降低生成图像任务的计算成本。
上下文与缓存优化: Token merging在现代promptable设计中压缩token数量，减少注意力机制的计算开销，提升吞吐率，同时保持输出质量。

general: Abstract describes BigMac as a novel MoE structure that swaps the prior CDAC communication pattern for a DCCA design, adding descending/ascending projections and restructured small experts to shift communication to a lower dimension and keep quality while boosting training/inference efficiency, so it directly targets LLM MoE inference/training throughput without adding systems-only layers or kernels. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16927))
模型结构侧推理优化: BigMac’s key innovation is a redesigned expert structure plus the DCCA communication order—abandoning the previous communicate-descend-ascend-communicate pipeline in favor of descend-communicate-communicate-ascend and re-sizing the expert body—so the core contribution is modifying the model structure used at inference/training to reduce all-to-all communication. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16927))

notes: Experiments report up to 3.09× lower training latency and 3.11× higher inference throughput on Megatron/Tutel/DeepSpeed-Inference, confirming the structural change improves MoE LLM throughput. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16927))

general: SVS refines pruned weights for generative models such as StyleGAN2/3 and DDPM to improve compression performance across GAN and Diffusion models.
模型压缩: The method minimizes disparities between singular values of pruned weights, guiding compressed models toward better fine-tuning and speeding up compression without extra training.

notes: ['Focus is on pruned-weight refinement for generative-model compression.']

general: Title and abstract describe RILQ as a LoRA-based quantization error compensation method for improving 2-bit LLM accuracy, so the study optimizes compressed LLM inference.
模型压缩: Abstract explains RILQ uses low-rank adapters to adjust quantization error compensation across layers and enables adapter-merged weight-quantized LLM inference with much better accuracy than existing LoRA methods in 2-bit settings.

notes: RILQ targets quantization error compensation on LoRA-adapted LLMs to boost sub-4-bit inference accuracy while keeping LoRA-like efficiency.

模型压缩: This paper focuses on compressing decoder-only transformer-based autoregressive models through structural weight pruning to improve the model efficiency while preserving performance for both language and image generation tasks and proposes a training-free pruning method plus a compensation algorithm to recover the pruned model.

notes: Structural weight pruning and recovery are applied directly to decoder-only autoregressive models to reduce memory use and speed up generation, so the core contribution is model compression.

general: ScaleOT’s abstract explains that offsite tuning protects privacy by compressing LLM layers through a layerwise lossy compression algorithm combined with harmonizers, and adds rank reduction to further shrink the original layers while keeping utility nearly intact.
模型压缩: The core method is a layerwise lossy compression algorithm that learns each layer’s importance via reinforcement learning, replaces layers with harmonizers, and applies rank reduction to compress the LLM layers and improve privacy.

notes: 摘要明确将主要贡献定位在压缩原始 LLM 层以提升隐私和效用的平衡。

general: Encoding time series into tokens and using language models for processing has been shown to substantially augment the models' ability to generalize to unseen tasks.

notes: Insufficient detail in the title/abstract to identify a specific optimization preference label.

general: Quantization algorithms can effectively compress LLMs and accelerate inference, but they lead to loss in precision, especially in low-bit scenarios.

To excavate those hidden treasures, we construct search spaces around these discarded weights and those weights within the search space can seamlessly be incorporated into the original quantization weights.
模型压缩: In this paper, we find that the discarded weight values caused by quantization in fact contain treasures to improve LLMs' accuracy, and we design a plug-and-play weight compensation framework to capture global information and keep the weights with the highest potential benefits.
Our framework can be combined with various LLM quantization algorithms to achieve higher precision without additional inference overhead.

notes: The work treats discarded quantized weights as compensations to enhance LLM precision, so the core lever is model compression.

general: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is highlighted as the path to accelerate LLM inference, and ABQ-LLM introduces an arbitrary-bit quantization algorithm and inference framework targeting LLMs such as LLaMA-7B.
模型压缩: Key innovations are distribution correction, bit balance, and a BTC-based quantization acceleration framework that reconstructs arbitrary precision matrix multiplication, turning each component bit-width reduction into real acceleration and memory gains.

notes: Focused on quantization-driven compression plus inference speedup for LLMs, so only the model compression preference applies.

模型压缩: Channel Merging merges similar channel parameters offline to reduce conflicts and storage, allowing performance comparable to ensembling with 53% parameters.

notes: Channel Merging directly compresses merged LLM experts by fusing channels, so the core contribution is parameter reduction rather than caching or scheduling.

general: Quantization stands as a pivotal technique for large language model (LLM) serving … achieving effective low-bit quantization.
ASER … introduces Error Reconstruction and Activation Smoothing to preserve accuracy in W4A8 per-channel quantization.
模型压缩: ASER is capable of quantizing typical LLMs to low-bit ones, particularly preserving accuracy even in W4A8 per-channel setup.

notes: ASER learns LoRA-style low-rank compensation and activation smoothing to reduce post-training quantization error for large LLMs.

general: Dynamic Operator Optimization (Dop) dynamically optimizes the Segmented Gather Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SGMV) operator to improve multi-tenant LoRA inference throughput.
算子与内核优化: Dop builds a Search Space Constructor plus an Optimization Engine that iteratively refines SGMV implementations via evolutionary search and a cost model so the operator adapts to different scenarios and maintains high performance.

notes: Operator-level optimization for multi-tenant LoRA serving is the main validated contribution.

解码策略优化: Title/abstract describe Falcon as a semi-autoregressive speculative decoding framework with a Custom-Designed Decoding Tree that drafts multiple tokens per forward pass to increase acceptance rate and speed up LLM inference.

notes: Falcon targets LLM inference by enhancing speculative decoding accuracy and parallel drafting, yielding 2.91×‑3.51× lossless speedup on Vicuna and LLaMA2-Chat series.

general: title=Multi-Branch Self-Drafting for LLM Inference Acceleration

abstract=To mitigate these constraints, we propose a multi-branch drafting procedure that efficiently generates draft sequences during decoding without extra models or training, boosting throughput by generating 2.0 to 3.2 tokens per forward step
解码策略优化: abstract=extend the autoregressive decoding paradigm to a multi-branch drafting procedure so LLMs can decode multiple tokens simultaneously in one forward propagation, roughly doubling end-to-end throughput

notes: Multi-branch self-drafting changes the decoding procedure so multiple simultaneous drafts validate tokens within one forward pass, the core decoding strategy contribution.

general: We choose to optimize the input data at the fine-grained level of tokens, cleverly preserving the original text structure.
Each action is a binary decision process to decide whether to retain a specific token information, and the agent learns token selection probabilities to refine the input.

notes: RTLIR learns to drop or keep tokens to refine LLM input, targeting token-level context management.

general: Title claims pruning large language models via Adaptive Sparse Trainer for semi-structured sparse models, and the abstract highlights feasibility of deploying highly compressed LLMs with distillation and extra initialization.
模型压缩: Abstract describes AST as a retraining framework learning optimal masks during weight updates for semi-structured sparsity and reports that LLaMA2-7B’s perplexity and zero-shot gap nearly closes while using under 0.4% of pretraining tokens and GPU hours, making compression the main lever.

notes: 核心在半结构稀疏训练与蒸馏，使 LLaMA2-7B 接近密集模型性能，强调模型压缩路径。

general: Generating CoT before answers boosts reasoning but the generated CoT is much longer than the desired answer, so C3oT compresses the original CoT into a shorter one while maintaining key information and interpretability to reduce decoding costs.
解码策略优化: C3oT introduces conditioned training and inference that learn relationships between long and short CoT and generate shorter CoT, cutting CoT length by over 50% without compromising effectiveness, directly reducing decoding overhead.

notes: CoT compression framework explicitly reshapes the decoding process to emit shorter reasoning chains while preserving accuracy.

general: Title describes dynamic-width speculative beam decoding aimed at LLM inference.
解码策略优化: Abstract highlights the autoregressive nature of LLMs makes inference slow and costly, motivating a decoding-focused optimization.

notes: Speculative decoding is the central method for speeding autoregressive LLM inference.

general: Serving LLMs requires substantial memory because the KV cache grows with sequence length.
上下文与缓存优化: QJL quantizes the KV cache to 3 bits while cutting memory usage and keeping accuracy.

notes: QJL couples a Johnson-Lindenstrauss sketch with sign-bit quantization to avoid storing per-block constants, offering an unbiased inner-product estimator with a lightweight CUDA kernel.

general: CSR converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights, making the KV cache more memory-efficient for inference in long-context LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: The abstract highlights CSR’s sparse representation of the KV cache plus NeuralDict’s learned dictionary so that the KV cache footprint shrinks without harming functionality.

notes: The paper’s main contribution is reducing KV cache memory pressure via sparse representations for LLM inference in memory-constrained settings.

上下文与缓存优化: 直接将整个代码仓库拼接进 prompt 会超出 Code LLM 的 context window，导致 completion 性能大幅下降。
Hierarchical Context Pruning 策略通过构造高质量的 completion prompt，使 prompt 长度保持在 8k tokens 左右（而整个仓库约 50k tokens），显著提升完成准确率和吞吐。

notes: HCP 是为长上下文管理/pruning 设计的，属于上下文与缓存的主优化杠杆。

上下文与缓存优化: Prompt compression … reduce computational costs and alleviate the burden on language models when processing lengthy prompts.

notes: 聚焦长上下文 prompt 压缩来缓解 LLM 处理成本，符合上下文与缓存优化标签唯一需求。

模型压缩: Compression-aware computing integrates compression techniques like sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to enhance efficiency while preserving performance.
general: The talk focuses on customizing large-scale generative AI models for cost-effective, resource-constrained devices by making them aware of their compressed states.

notes: Framework emphasizes compression to make generative models scalable and accessible across constrained hardware.

模型压缩: leverage modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.
general: Probabilistic inference is a fundamental challenge spanning approximate Bayesian inference to generative AI.

notes: Talk centers on accelerating probabilistic generative-model inference via low-precision/sparsity compute, making model compression the main optimization lever.

上下文与缓存优化: While 4-bit quantization is memory-optimal for non-reasoning models, the paper shows that KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory for reasoning workloads, so deployment decisions must prioritize cache management. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

The authors run 1,700 inference configurations and find a scale-dependent trade-off that even decides whether KV cache eviction outperforms KV quantization, highlighting cache-focused strategies. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

notes: Focus is on memory-optimal deployment for reasoning LLMs, emphasizing when to trade off KV cache versus model capacity/quantization based on scale. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

general: Large Language Model (LLM) inference is typically memory-intensive, especially when processing large batch sizes and long sequences, due to the large size of key-value (KV) cache, motivating KV cache compression. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: NSNQuant is a calibration-free vector quantization technique designed for low-bit compression of the KV cache by aligning token distributions through a double-normalization pipeline, enabling robust quantization without calibration datasets. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

notes: NSNQuant focuses on KV cache quantization (token distribution alignment with a standard normal, via Normalize-Shift-Normalize plus Hadamard) to shrink memory and boost throughput for LLM inference, rather than modifying decoder, kernel, or system scheduling layers. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

general: 标题和摘要聚焦注意力汇与压缩谷的现象与理论联系，并借助Mix-Compress-Refine信息流理论解释Transformer中不同层的计算阶段，未提出符合六个偏好标签的具体优化手段。

notes: 论文是对LLM内部激活与信息流阶段的分析，没涉及解码、缓存、系统、内核或结构压缩类主优化杠杆。

general: Title: DuoAttention: Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference with Retrieval and Streaming Heads.
Abstract: Deploying long-context large language models (LLMs) is essential but poses significant computational and memory challenges.

notes: 摘要与标题仅提到长上下文 LLM 推理挑战及检索/流式 head，未提供明确的六类偏好标签中的任一核心优化证据。

general: Accelerating large language model (LLM) inference for high throughput deployment, focusing on contextual sparsity shifting cost toward attention heads.
Polar Sparsity introduces Selective Head Attention and sparsity-aware GPU kernels to scale contextual sparsity to large batch sizes while keeping accuracy stable.
算子与内核优化: Selective Head Attention is paired with hardware-efficient, sparsity-aware GPU kernels, delivering up to 2.2× end-to-end speedups across OPT, LLaMA-2/3, Qwen, and Mistral at various batch sizes and sequence lengths.

notes: 主贡献是通过面向 attention head 的稀疏 GPU kernel 加速推理流水线，属于算子/内核层面的优化。

general: Title: Training Free Exponential Context Extension via Cascading KV Cache

Abstract: Introducing cascading sub-cache buffers to selectively retain the most relevant tokens enables maintaining longer context histories without increasing cache size while outperforming linear caching baselines across streaming perplexity, QA, book summarization, and passkey retrieval benchmarks.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: We introduce a novel mechanism that leverages cascading sub-cache buffers to selectively retain the most relevant tokens, enabling the model to maintain longer context histories without increasing the cache size and reducing prefill-stage latency by a factor of 6.8 compared to flash attention on 1M tokens.

notes: 重点在于 KV cache 的 cascading 缓存层级，直接面向上下文与缓存管理的推理效率提升。

模型压缩: Title references 'LLM Sparsity' with Surrogate-Free ADMM, implying compression focus.
Abstract says 'Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate excessive computational and memory requirements of LLMs.'

notes: Paper centers on pruning LLMs to reduce compute/memory, so the model compression tag is the core optimization lever.

general: We introduce the Bottlenecked Transformer, augmenting a decoder-only LLM with a Cache Processor that performs periodic, non-causal in-place KV rewrites at reasoning step boundaries.
上下文与缓存优化: The processor consolidates recently written KV entries and reconsolidates a top-k attention-selected set of prior entries conditioned on recent context, enabling memory consolidation/reconsolidation for improved reasoning.

notes: KV cache consolidation and reconsolidation is the core optimization lever, so we tag the abstract’s description as context/cache optimization evidence.

general: Title and abstract present MUFFIN as a neural psychoacoustic coding framework that reconstructs multi-band frequency content and uses Multi-Band Spectral Residual Vector Quantization for high-fidelity audio compression.

Abstract emphasizes psychoacoustically guided bitrate allocation, transformer-inspired convolutional architecture, and evaluations on LibriTTS/IEMOCAP/GTZAN/BBC datasets, confirming the focus is on audio coding rather than the prescribed optimization levers.
negative: The work centers on improving audio compression quality via vector quantization and frequency-aware reconstruction; it does not introduce or validate any of the six target levers (decoding strategy, context/cache, system scheduling, operators/kernels, inference structure tweaks, or parameter compression) as the main contribution.

notes: MUFFIN is a neural audio codec, so none of the requested optimization labels apply; therefore the response marks negative.

general: Abstract: "We propose a serving system that employs similarity-based expert consolidation to reduce the overall memory footprint by sharing similar experts across models" and "to ensure output quality, we introduce runtime partial reconfiguration, dynamically replacing non-expert layers when processing requests from different models" while maintaining throughput and TTFT comparable to single-model serving.
系统与调度优化: Serving system for multi-tenant MoE LLMs that consolidates similar experts and performs runtime partial reconfiguration to reduce memory usage and keep throughput competitive on a single GPU.

notes: Authors validate a serving-level optimization for multi-tenant MoE LLM deployment, so we flag the system/scheduling improvement as the primary contribution.

解码策略优化: This paper proposes a training-free online learning framework to adaptively choose the configuration of the hyperparameters for speculative decoding as text is being generated.
general: Speculative decoding has emerged as a popular method to accelerate the inference of Large Language Models (LLMs) while retaining their superior text generation performance.

Extensive empirical experiments with LLaMA3 and Qwen2 demonstrate that our algorithms are effective compared to existing methods, and the throughput is close to the oracle best hyperparameter in simulated real-life LLM serving scenarios with diverse input prompts.

notes: BanditSpec frames speculative-decoding hyperparameter tuning as a bandit problem, with UCBSpec/EXP3Spec dynamically selecting decoding settings and proving near-optimal regret while giving throughput close to the simulated oracle.

general: SCBench is introduced as a comprehensive benchmark for long-context methods focused on the KV cache lifecycle (generation, compression, retrieval, loading) and analyzes existing solutions across multiple LLMs rather than proposing a new optimization technique.

notes: Benchmark-driven analysis without a new system-level or kernel-level optimization contribution.

general: Speculative sampling reduces the latency of autoregressive decoding for target model LLMs ... using a cheap draft model to suggest a candidate token and a verification criterion to accept or resample this token, and our findings give the first multi-draft algorithm with 90% acceptance and under 100 ms of overhead per generated token with negligible deviation from the target model distribution.
解码策略优化: We reverse engineer subset selection to formulate the OTLP as a max-flow problem ... reduce the exponentially large OTLP to a convex optimization problem in at most V variables, enabling an algorithm for optimal n-draft speculative sampling that can be tuned to arbitrary accuracy.

notes: Optimization targets multi-draft speculative decoding for LLM inference.

general: prima.cpp 在混合 CPU/GPU、内存/显存不足、慢硬盘和异构 OS 家用集群上实现 30-70B LLM 推理，强调跨设备负载均衡与带宽耐受。
系统与调度优化: 提出 pipelined-ring parallelism 以重叠磁盘 I/O、计算与通信，并通过 Halda 异构调度器在 RAM/VRAM 约束下共优化设备选择与任务分配。

notes: 作者的核心贡献是系统级调度与 I/O/计算交叠策略，让低资源异构家用集群高效跑大模型。

general: InfiniPot-V monitors the KV cache during video encoding and triggers a compression pass once a memory threshold is reached.
上下文与缓存优化: The compression pass removes temporally redundant tokens via TaR and keeps significant ones via VaN ranking, dissolving the KV cache bottleneck without retraining.

notes: Multimodal streaming video KV cache compression keeps long-context inference within hard memory limits.

general: Mixture Compressor (MC) integrates static quantization and dynamic pruning to deliver extreme compression for MoE-LLMs with minimal accuracy loss.
模型压缩: Pre-Loading Mixed-Precision Quantization (PMQ) formulates adaptive bit-width allocation among experts, enabling 76.6% compression at 2.54 bits and only a 3.8% average accuracy drop.

notes: Core contribution is expert-parameter quantization (PMQ) plus selective pruning to shrink MoE weight storage while preserving inference quality.

general: 摘要指出Dynamic-LLaVA通过动态减少视觉上下文冗余，在prefill和 decoding 阶段显著降低推理计算与内存开销。
上下文与缓存优化: Dynamic-LLaVA 设计了针对不同推理模式（prefill、带/不带KV cache的 decoding）的稀疏推理方案，贯穿整个生成过程削减视觉-语言上下文冗余，从而降低 prefll/decoding 的计算与KV cache内存消耗。

general: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances large language models (LLMs) by integrating external knowledge, but scaling RAG pipelines remains computationally expensive as context length grows.
上下文与缓存优化: OSCAR is a novel query-dependent online soft compression method that dynamically compresses retrieved information at inference time, eliminating storage overhead and enabling higher compression rates than existing methods, directly managing context length for RAG pipelines.

notes: Evaluation claims 2-5x inference speed-up for 1B-24B LLMs via online compression of retrieved context.

模型压缩: Quantization techniques such as BitsAndBytes, AWQ, and GPTQ are widely used ... Low-rank correction methods ... restore all layers ... increases latency and memory overhead ... GlowQ ... caches a single shared right factor per input-sharing group and restores only the groups or layers that yield the highest accuracy benefit.

notes: GlowQ introduces group-shared low-rank corrections to keep quantized LLM accuracy without restoring every decoder block.

上下文与缓存优化: Key-Value (KV) cache retention strategies mitigate this issue... we propose ProtoKV that separately processes these two token categories for KV cache compression ... form clusters of semantically similar tokens as basic compression units.

notes: ProtoKV centers on KV cache compression to preserve long-context semantic integrity in LLM inference.

general: Paper proposes MPCache, an MPC-friendly KV cache eviction framework to discard unimportant KV cache and dynamically activate a subset for attention, directly targeting long-context LLM inference efficiency.

notes: 专注于私有LLM推理中的KV cache管理，主要贡献在上下文/kV缓存优化。

general: Large language models face prohibitive compute and memory demands, so the paper studies SVD as a hardware-independent, tunable solution and proposes Dobi-SVD to analyze truncating weights/activations and address optimal truncation/updates/information loss in SVD-based LLM compression. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/218ca0d92e6ed8f9db00621e103dc70c-Abstract-Conference.html))
模型压缩: With a 40% parameter-compression rate, Dobi-SVD matches the best prior SVD compression, achieves a perplexity of 9.07 on Wikitext2 with LLama-7B, and is touted as the first method to reach such high-ratio LLM compression with minimal performance drop for both LLMs and VLMs. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/218ca0d92e6ed8f9db00621e103dc70c-Abstract-Conference.html))
摘要指出为降低 LLM 的计算成本，作者以量化、稀疏化与结构化剪枝为基础，提出按 block/层级动态非均匀调整压缩率的进化搜索策略，以兼顾准确率与全局压缩门限。

notes: 核心贡献围绕基于进化搜索的动态压缩调度，故归类为模型压缩。

general: Speculative decoding has become a widely adopted as an effective technique for lossless inference acceleration when deploying large language models (LLMs).
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding has become a widely adopted as an effective technique for lossless inference acceleration when deploying large language models (LLMs).

系统与调度优化: Preble提出首个面向提示共享的分布式LLM服务平台，设计了新的调度算法与分层调度机制，协同优化KV状态复用与计算负载均衡，显著压低平均与p99延迟。 ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5bc342f48de8264779952fac378f96dc-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

notes: Preble通过prompt-aware distributed scheduling in serving workloads with shared prefixes, achieving 1.5×–14.5× avg latency and 2×–10× p99 latency improvements over prior distributed serving systems. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5bc342f48de8264779952fac378f96dc-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

general: 提出静态8bit per-tensor量化，抑制Selective SSM输入激活大值并对输出使用Hadamard变换以避免Outlier，从而支持Mamba 2.8B与Jamba 52B等SSM在云/边缘部署。
量化后在Nvidia Orin Nano 8G上生成延迟下降1.72倍，zero-shot准确率仅下降0.9%，52B模型仅下降1%准确率，展示硬件加速和低精度可扩展性。

ThinK introduces query-driven pruning of key-cache channels—targeting low-magnitude channels while minimizing attention loss—which cuts KV cache memory by over 20% compared to vanilla eviction/quantization methods for long-context inference ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/8edb116d5b288b6a9bba4c16ab647702-Paper-Conference.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: Each query computes channel importance scores to prune the least significant key-cache channels on-the-fly, shrinking the KV cache while preserving performance in LLaMA and Mistral long-benchmarks and in combination with quantization (e.g., KIVI) ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/8edb116d5b288b6a9bba4c16ab647702-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: ThinK’s main lever is KV cache channel pruning for inference efficiency, yielding ≈2.8× peak memory reduction when paired with quantization while maintaining accuracy in long-context workloads ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/8edb116d5b288b6a9bba4c16ab647702-Paper-Conference.pdf))

系统与调度优化: We introduce Encode-Prefill-Decode (EPD) Disaggregation, a novel framework that separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources.
a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving
a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics.

notes: EPD disaggregation decouples stage execution across dedicated resources while adding resource-allocation and workload role-switching to improve multimodal model serving SLOs.

general: With the widespread deployment of long-context large language models (LLMs), there has been a growing demand for efficient support of high-throughput inference.
上下文与缓存优化: ShadowKV stores the low-rank key cache and offloads the value cache to reduce the memory footprint for larger batch sizes and longer sequences, and it employs an accurate KV selection strategy that reconstructs minimal sparse KV pairs on-the-fly to minimize decoding latency.

notes: Optimizes KV cache handling for long-context LLM serving to boost throughput without accuracy loss.

general: SpinQuant incorporates learned rotation matrices for optimal quantized network accuracy on Transformer LLMs, reducing the accuracy gap to full precision while quantizing weights, activations, and the KV cache.
The method achieves tight zero-shot reasoning performance with 4-bit quantization of weights, activations, and KV cache on LLaMA-2/3 models, surpassing other quantized LLM baselines.
模型压缩: SpinQuant narrows the zero-shot reasoning accuracy gap to full precision to 2.9 points on LLaMA-2 7B with 4-bit quantization and outperforms prior quantization approaches such as LLM-QAT and SmoothQuant.

notes: The paper optimizes LLM inference by learned rotations that reduce quantization error across weights, activations, and KV cache, firmly positioning the contribution under model compression.

general: Large-language-model inference with long contexts often produces key–value (KV) caches whose footprint exceeds the capacity of high-bandwidth memory on a GPU.
上下文与缓存优化: Prior LLM inference frameworks such as vLLM mitigate this pressure by swapping KV cache pages to host DRAM, while HiFC introduces a DRAM-free swapping scheme that stores KV pages in pseudo-SLC regions of SSDs and enables direct transfers between SSD and GPU to bypass host DRAM.

general: GANQ 提出针对大语言模型部署挑战的 GPU 适配非均匀量化，旨在提升内存和推理效率。
模型压缩: 摘要中提到利用低位量化权重并设计层级后训练非均匀量化框架，在 3-bit 和 4-bit 量化下减少 perplexity 差距并在 RTX 4090 上获得高达 2.57× 推理加速。

notes: 基于 GPU 优化的非均匀量化属于模型压缩主线，直接改善权重量化精度和推理速度。

模型压缩: Multi-scale quantization enables memory-efficient runtime model adaptation by overlaying multiple variants quantized to different bitwidths.
DP-LLM dynamically assigns precision per layer based on input values to match latency/precision targets.

notes: Dynamic layer-wise precision assignment for DP-LLM adapts to runtime constraints.

上下文与缓存优化: TRIM-KV learns each token’s intrinsic importance at creation time via a lightweight retention gate ... Tokens with low scores are evicted when the memory budget is exceeded, ensuring the cache always contains the most critical tokens.

notes: 针对内存受限的长上下文推理，论文通过 retention gate 驱动 KV cache 中 token retention。

general: Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests.

Existing context caching requires exact prefix matches across requests, limiting reuse cases in settings such as few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation, where immutable content remains unchanged across requests but is preceded by varying prefixes.
上下文与缓存优化: Authors focus on position-independent caching to reuse KV vectors even when prior prefixes change, highlighting context caching as the core serving optimization for complex prompts.

notes: 主线在提升 LLM 推理服务中上下文缓存的复用能力，明确属于上下文与缓存优化。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular bricks (vision, audio, language) and maps each onto the ideal accelerator while coordinating shared memory with a token-aware buffer manager, enabling a battery-powered device to run LLaVA and LLaMA-3 offline with higher throughput and energy efficiency than prior implementations. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: Module-level dynamic offloading and scheduling across heterogeneous NPUs/GPUs/CPUs on unified-memory SoCs is the core contribution, letting each multimodal module execute where it runs best while bypassing CPU bottlenecks. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))

notes: Custom software-hardware co-design cuts energy use by 42.3% and GPU memory by 11.2%, supporting nearly half-day LLaVA vision and ~20.8-hour LLaMA-3 voice inference on a single charge. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))

general: Title: ICaRus: Identical Cache Reuse for Efficient Multi-Model Inference.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Multi model inference ... each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

notes: Focuses on reusing KV cache across models to reduce memory during multi-model inference.

general: Abstract describes an empirical benchmark (ACBench) for measuring how existing compression recipes like GPTQ/AWQ quantization and Wanda/SparseGPT pruning affect agentic capabilities, rather than introducing or validating a specific new optimization lever from the given taxonomy.

notes: Paper focuses on benchmarking compressed LLM behavior, so none of the six preference labels is the primary validated contribution.

general: Title and abstract frame the work as reducing KV cache burden and speeding LLM decoding through better cache retrieval.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract explains dynamically selecting critical KV caches during decoding and Spotlight Attention’s non-linear hashing vastly improves retrieval precision and hash efficiency.

notes: Spotlight Attention introduces a non-linear hashing retrieval module plus Bradley-Terry training and fast CUDA kernels to shrink KV cache bandwidth, so the main optimization lever is cache/context management.

上下文与缓存优化: CommVQ 提出用可交换的向量量化压缩 KV cache，并在 RoPE 下能用简单矩阵乘积恢复，目标是大幅减小长上下文 LLM 推理时的 KV cache 内存瓶颈。
实验证明 2-bit 量化可将 FP16 KV cache 缩小 87.5%，甚至能在单张 RTX 4090 上让 LLaMA-3.1 8B 以 128K 上下文运行，突显压缩 KV cache 的核心贡献。

notes: 工作核心是 KV cache 的量化压缩与解码集成，主优化杠杆是上下文缓存管理。

general: Recent methods have made notable progress in accelerating Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) by exploiting the inherent redundancy in visual inputs...reducing visual redundancy at the encoder stage not only speeds up the encoder itself but also significantly lightens the workload for the subsequent LLM.
Motivated by this, we investigate how to jointly optimize the image encoder and the LLM along with other LVLM components for comprehensive acceleration.
上下文与缓存优化: To mitigate the risk of performance degradation from token reduction, we propose a novel token merging strategy that recycles useful information from otherwise discarded tokens.

notes: iLLaVA focuses on merging/recycling visual tokens to cut redundant context before the LLM, so the primary lever is context and cache reduction across encoder+LLM.

general: any4 is a learned 4-bit weight quantization solution for LLMs providing arbitrary numeric representations without requiring pre-processing of weights or activations.

any4 yields higher accuracy compared to other related 4-bit numeric representation types as evaluated on a range of model sizes, generations and families, and also shows competitiveness at lower bits.
We open source tinygemm, a latency optimized GPU matrix multiplication library for LLMs, that implements any4 using a GPU-efficient lookup table strategy along with other common quantization methods.
模型压缩: any4 is a learned 4-bit weight quantization solution for LLMs providing arbitrary numeric representations without requiring pre-processing of weights or activations.

notes: Calibration can use a single curated diverse sample instead of hundreds.

general: Title/abstract focus on optimizing KV cache eviction to improve LLM inference efficiency.
上下文与缓存优化: Ada-KV introduces a head-wise adaptive budget allocation strategy that plugs into prior KV cache eviction methods and is evaluated across Ruler and LongBench datasets under question-aware/agnostic scenarios.

notes: 主要贡献是针对 LLM 推理中的 KV cache eviction 做 head 级 budget 自适应，因此归类为上下文与缓存优化。

general: Large Vision-Language Models encode images into thousands of tokens, creating overhead; Balanced Token Pruning stages pruning to balance current-layer and subsequent-layer impact for LVLMs and reports 78% compression while preserving 96.7% performance.
上下文与缓存优化: Balanced Token Pruning divides pruning into stages using a calibration set to focus on downstream-layer impact early and local consistency later, explicitly pruning vision tokens to reduce context cost.

notes: Plugin-style token pruning targets LVLM context management, not system scheduling or decoder flow.

general: SeedLM is introduced as a post-training compression method that encodes each block of weights as seeds for a pseudo-random generator to reconstruct the block, thus reducing memory access during inference.
Experiments with Llama3 70B demonstrate that 4- and 3-bit SeedLM matches or beats state-of-the-art accuracy while delivering speed-ups over FP16 baselines, confirming the compression claim.

notes: SeedLM’s core contribution is compressing LLM weights via pseudo-random generator seeds without calibration data.

上下文与缓存优化: CateKV is a hybrid KV cache method that retains only critical token information for consistent heads, reducing KV cache size and computational overhead while keeping adaptive heads’ KV pairs to preserve accuracy for long-context LLM inference.

notes: Focus is on optimizing KV cache storage/compute for LLM long-context inference rather than broader system or decoding pipeline changes.

general: FlatQuant is a new post-training quantization method that flattens weights and activations through optimal affine transformations calibrated per linear layer and fused into a single kernel.
The method targets LLaMA-3-70B INT4 quantization and reports state-of-the-art results with minimal accuracy loss while speeding up prefill/decoding compared to FP16.
模型压缩: By enhancing flatness of weights/activations and compressing them via lightweight affine transforms, the paper directly advances quantization benchmarks (e.g., beating SpinQuant by 7.5% and achieving <1% accuracy drop).

notes: Focus is on compressing LLM weights/activations (post-training quantization) rather than system or decoding changes, so only the 模型压缩 tag is valid.

general: OmniKV is a token-dropping-free and training-free inference method that achieves 1.68x speedup while reducing KV cache memory usage by up to 75% and extending the maximum context length of Llama-3-8B on A100 from 128K to 450K.
上下文与缓存优化: To mitigate the growing GPU memory footprint of the KV cache during long-context LLM inference, OmniKV leverages the similarity of important tokens across consecutive layers to optimally offload and shrink the cache without dropping tokens.

notes: 主攻通过动态选择/压缩 KV cache 内容以减少上下文缓存压力，显著降低显存并扩展支持的上下文长度。

上下文与缓存优化: abstract: Introduces Delta-guided Two stage Pruning (DTP) that progressively reduces token redundancy through selective early-layer pruning and complete late-layer pruning, deriving token importance from Mamba’s parameters to decide which tokens to remove.

notes: Token pruning is the core contribution, so only the上下文与缓存优化 label applies.

general: SuffixDecoding introduces speculative decoding that caches long token sequences via suffix trees and adaptively speculates more tokens when acceptance likelihood is high to cut latency for agentic LLM workloads.

notes: Title/abstract describe a speculative decoding innovation that directly modifies token prediction flow to accelerate LLM inference.

general: Diffusion models can effectively generate high-quality images. However, as they scale, rising memory demands and higher latency pose substantial deployment challenges. In this work, we aim to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing their weights and activations to 4 bits. At such an aggressive level, both weights and activations are highly sensitive, where existing post-training quantization methods like smoothing become insufficient.

To overcome this limitation, we propose SVDQuant, a new 4-bit quantization paradigm. Different from smoothing, which redistributes outliers between weights and activations, our approach absorbs these outliers using a low-rank branch. We first consolidate the outliers by shifting them from activations to weights. Then, we use a high-precision, low-rank branch to take in the weight outliers with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), while a low-bit quantized branch handles the residuals. This process eases the quantization on both sides.

Extensive experiments on SDXL, PixArt-Σ, and FLUX.1 validate the effectiveness of SVDQuant in preserving image quality. We reduce the memory usage for the 12B FLUX.1 models by 3.5×, achieving 3.0× speedup over the 4-bit weight-only quantization (W4A16) baseline on the 16GB laptop 4090 GPU with INT4 precision.
模型压缩: Diffusion models can effectively generate high-quality images. However, as they scale, rising memory demands and higher latency pose substantial deployment challenges. In this work, we aim to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing their weights and activations to 4 bits. At such an aggressive level, both weights and activations are highly sensitive, where existing post-training quantization methods like smoothing become insufficient.

To overcome this limitation, we propose SVDQuant, a new 4-bit quantization paradigm. Different from smoothing, which redistributes outliers between weights and activations, our approach absorbs these outliers using a low-rank branch. We first consolidate the outliers by shifting them from activations to weights. Then, we use a high-precision, low-rank branch to take in the weight outliers with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), while a low-bit quantized branch handles the residuals. This process eases the quantization on both sides.

general: Abstract notes MoE LLMs face enormous parameter sizes and memory demands that hinder resource-constrained deployment, signaling a compression focus.
模型压缩: Title ‘KBVQ-MoE: KLT-guided SVD with Bias-Corrected Vector Quantization for MoE Large Language Models’ explicitly frames the contribution as vector quantization of the MoE model parameters, i.e. model compression.

notes: Inference relies on the title/abstract highlighting vector quantization to shrink MoE LLM parameters.

general: Autoregressive models, often built on Transformer architectures, represent a powerful paradigm for generating ultra-long videos by synthesizing content in sequential chunks; however, this sequential generation process is notoriously slow.
上下文与缓存优化: Caching strategies have proven effective for accelerating traditional video diffusion models, and the paper highlights that existing methods assume uniform denoising across all frames, which breaks down in autoregressive models with varying similarity patterns—motivating new caching treatments for these models.

notes: 聚焦 autoregressive 视频生成的缓存优化。

general: Abstract highlights SpaceServe as a serving system that space-multiplexes MLLMs by decoupling modality encoders from the decoder and co-locating them on a single GPU through fine-grained SM partitioning, avoiding time-multiplexed idle SM or HBM periods. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

Evaluation highlights SpaceServe reducing time-per-output-token by 4.81× on average and up to 28.9× on Nvidia A100 GPUs by overlapping encoder and decoder workloads. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: SpaceServe relies on a cost-model-guided Space-Inference Scheduler (SIS) that dynamically assigns SM slices and a Time-Windowed Shortest-Remaining-First (TWSRFT) batching policy for encoder requests to minimize completion latency and smooth decoder arrivals. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

notes: 空分复用服务系统通过 SIS/TWSRFT 算法实现编码器和解码器的协同调度以降低推理时延。

general: 摘要指出 Bit-DGDM 是为离散图扩散模型设计的后训练量化框架，包含稀疏-密集激活量化和低秩分解，以缓解推理计算瓶颈。
模型压缩: 标题与关键词突出了“后训练量化”以及“离散图扩散模型”，摘要强调 Bit-DGDM 减少 FP32 内存使用至 2.8×、实现 2.5× 速度提升，证明了量化核心贡献。

notes: 根据摘要，作者主攻离散图扩散模型的后训练量化，量化手段是唯一明确的优化杠杆。

general: FreqKV iteratively compresses the increasing KV cache in the frequency domain, enabling longer context windows while maintaining perplexity.

notes: 专注于KV cache压缩以扩展上下文窗口，没有引入其他主优化杠杆。

general: Increasing DNN size necessitates effective model compression to reduce compute and memory footprints for deployment on resource-constrained platforms.
Paper experimentally evaluates sparsity and quantization across LLMs (OPT, LLaMA) and vision models (ViT, ResNet) to guide efficient inference.
模型压缩: Authors prove sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal, show order matters, and that compounded errors from combining them hurt accuracy, guiding best practices for accuracy-preserving compression.

notes: 主要贡献在于研究稀疏化与量化联合使用时的相互影响，以优化模型压缩顺序并指导高效部署。

上下文与缓存优化: FreeKV pairs speculative KV retrieval with hybrid CPU/GPU layouts and double-buffered streamed recall to hide transfers while keeping near-lossless accuracy, making KV cache retrieval the core optimization target. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

notes: FreeKV is an algorithm-system co-optimization that accelerates KV cache retrieval for LLM inference, reporting up to 13× speedups with minimal accuracy degradation. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

general: DFloat11 is a lossless compression framework that reduces LLM and diffusion model size by 30% while preserving bit-for-bit identical outputs, enabling longer generation lengths and supporting massive models on single nodes.
模型压缩: DFloat11 applies entropy coding to BFloat16 weights, assigning dynamic-length encodings per frequency and adding transformer-block-level decompression via a custom GPU kernel to achieve near information-optimal compression without precision loss.

notes: 核心贡献在于模型参数的无损压缩与高效解码，使大型生成模型在固定 GPU 预算下可推理更长上下文。

general: Introduces a lightweight benchmarking framework to evaluate compressed LLMs on mobile devices, focusing on resource efficiency and harmful output rather than proposing optimization techniques.

notes: Benchmarking study of quantized LLMs on mobile platforms; no new decoding/caching/system optimization method described.

general: KV cache grows linearly with context length, creating memory bottlenecks. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))
ChanMix mixes channel-aware bit allocations via Triton kernels for low-bit quantization. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))
上下文与缓存优化: ChanMix quantizes the KV cache with channel-aware bit reallocation to support longer contexts and larger batches. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))

notes: Targets KV cache quantization, enabling 2.3× batch size and 1.5× longer context gains per the ICLR 2026 poster. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))

general: KV cache quantization can improve Large Language Models (LLMs) inference throughput and latency in long contexts and large batch-size scenarios while preserving LLMs effectiveness.

notes: 论文通过 KV cache 量化直接优化上下文缓存，显式验证了性能与效果的权衡。

general: SALS将KV cache投影到低秩latent space后只对关键token进行稀疏重建，避免了完整KV cache重构带来的开销并保持高精度。
作者在LLaMA2-7b-chat、Mistral-7b，以及RULER-128k benchmark上验证了该框架，报告了6.4倍KV cache压缩和在4K序列上5.7倍的attention算子加速。
上下文与缓存优化: 通过latent space的低秩projection与RoPE-free查询交互完成稀疏token选择，SALS直接以压缩KV cache为核心目标，不依赖系统调度或模型结构变更。

notes: ['主贡献聚焦KV cache的压缩与稀疏token重建，显式优化上下文缓存开销。']

general: Adaptive KV updates for diffusion LLMs reduce redundant recomputation across denoising steps.
Elastic-Cache achieves consistent decoding speedups with minimal accuracy loss on GSM8K, longer sequences, and HumanEval.
上下文与缓存优化: Elastic-Cache decides when/where to refresh caches via attention-aware drift tests and depth-aware schedules, reusing shallow-layer and off-window MASK caches to minimize redundant KV recomputation.

notes: Focused on KV cache reuse to accelerate decoding for diffusion LLMs.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance ... yet their massive size makes serving them inefficient and costly.
ProxSparse transforms the rigid, non-differentiable mask selection process into a smoother optimization procedure, allowing gradual mask exploration with flexibility.
模型压缩: Semi-structured pruning has emerged as an effective method for model acceleration ... We present ProxSparse, a learning-based framework for mask selection enabled by regularized optimization ... Our extensive evaluations ... show that ProxSparse consistently outperforms previously proposed semi-structured mask selection methods with significant improvement, demonstrating the effectiveness of our learned approach towards semi-structured pruning.

notes: Learning-based semi-structured pruning for LLMs via ProxSparse regularized mask selection without additional weight updates; global feedback drives mask optimization.
